SELECT [t0].[Id], [t0].[Color], [t0].[CreationTime], [t0].[CreatorUserId], [t0].[DeleterUserId], [t0].[DeletionTime], [t0].[Description], [t0].[IsActive], [t0].[IsDeleted], [t0].[LastModificationTime], [t0].[LastModifierUserId], [t0].[Level], [t0].[StudentsCount], [t0].[TeachersCount], [t1].[Id], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreationTime], [t1].[CreatorUserId], [t1].[GradeGroupId], [t1].[GradeId], [t1].[Name], [t1].[SubjectId]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [s].[Id], [s].[Color], [s].[CreationTime], [s].[CreatorUserId], [s].[DeleterUserId], [s].[DeletionTime], [s].[Description], [s].[IsActive], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[LastModificationTime], [s].[LastModifierUserId], [s].[Level], [s].[StudentsCount], [s].[TeachersCount]
    FROM [Subjects] AS [s]
    WHERE (@__ef_filter__p_0 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)) AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Translations] AS [t]
        WHERE [s].[Id] = [t].[SubjectId] AND [t].[Name] = @__8__locals3_sub_En_0)
) AS [t0]
LEFT JOIN [Translations] AS [t1] ON [t0].[Id] = [t1].[SubjectId]
ORDER BY [t0].[Id]

    SELECT TOP(1) [s].[Id], [s].[Color], [s].[CreationTime], [s].[CreatorUserId], [s].[DeleterUserId], [s].[DeletionTime], [s].[Description], [s].[IsActive], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[LastModificationTime], [s].[LastModifierUserId], [s].[Level], [s].[StudentsCount], [s].[TeachersCount]
    FROM [Subjects] AS [s]
    WHERE (@__ef_filter__p_0 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)) AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Translations] AS [t]
        WHERE [s].[Id] = [t].[SubjectId] AND [t].[Name] = @__8__locals3_sub_En_0)
) AS [t0]
LEFT JOIN [Translations] AS [t1] ON [t0].[Id] = [t1].[SubjectId]
ORDER BY [t0].[Id]

    ORDER BY [c].[CreationTime] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]

    SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[CreationTime], [c0].[CreatorUserId], [c0].[DeleterUserId], [c0].[DeletionTime], [c0].[DialCode], [c0].[IsActive], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[LastModificationTime], [c0].[LastModifierUserId]

) AS [t1] ON [t].[Id] = [t1].[CoreId]

    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[CountryId], [c].[CreationTime], [c].[CreatorUserId], [c].[DeleterUserId], [c].[DeletionTime], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[LastModificationTime], [c].[LastModifierUserId]

    ORDER BY [c].[CreationTime] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[CreationTime], [c0].[CreatorUserId], [c0].[DeleterUserId], [c0].[DeletionTime], [c0].[DialCode], [c0].[IsActive], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[LastModificationTime], [c0].[LastModifierUserId]

) AS [t0] ON [t].[CountryId] = [t0].[Id]

) AS [t1] ON [t].[Id] = [t1].[CoreId]

) AS [t2] ON [t0].[Id] = [t2].[CoreId]
